title: Rating
description: A numerical or categorical score assigned by a user to a driver, vehicle, or mobility service experience.

ratedEntityId.description: Identifier of the entity being rated (driver, vehicle, service)

ratedEntityType.description: Type of entity being rated (DRIVER, VEHICLE, SERVICE)

comment.description: Optional text comment accompanying the rating

target.description: The entity being rated, with id and category (Order, Fulfillment, Provider, Agent)

range.description: Rating scale definition (numeric range or descriptor array)

ratingValue.description: Numeric rating value selected by the user

feedback.description: Textual feedback or written review accompanying the rating
